presentation.title: Adriano Andrade da Silva
presentation.openToWork: Open to Senior Full Stack / Front-End roles
presentation.summary:
Software Engineer focused on frontend architecture, React/TypeScript, and AdTech ecosystems. 

Experience building high-traffic platforms, design systems, global state management solutions, and automated testing pipelines. 

Collaborative background in agile environments across product, UX, and engineering teams.
presentation.about: Corinthians fan, music and POP culture enthusiast.

experience.title: Experience
experience.filter: Filter by technology (e.g.: React, Node, Ruby)

jobs.name: UOL
jobs.description:
Architecture & High-Impact Frontend
Responsible for architecting large-scale React/TypeScript applications, focused on componentization, reusability, and maintainability. Defined coding standards, global state management strategies, and module structures for multidisciplinary teams on platforms handling millions of monthly visits.

AdTech & Programmatic Advertising
Development and integration with Google Ad Manager, Prebid, and proprietary Ad Server infrastructure. Implementation of bidding logic, line item configuration, and ad inventory management across high-traffic portals.

Design System & Component Architecture
Built and maintained reusable component libraries aligned to design systems, in direct collaboration with UX/UI teams using Figma, Adobe XD, and Zeplin.

Performance & Quality
Performance optimization across high-traffic applications with attention to code splitting, lazy loading, and Web Vitals metrics. Automated testing with Vitest to ensure reliability and code coverage.

Automation & Internal Systems
Led the development of UOL's new FAQ system, replacing a third-party solution and significantly reducing operational costs. Built automation tools for bulk publishing of ad campaigns used by Operations teams.

jobs.name: Gigaservices
jobs.description:
Interface Development with Ruby on Rails
Creation and maintenance of views in Ruby on Rails applications, applying JavaScript, jQuery and Bootstrap to ensure functional and responsive interfaces.

Feature and Back-End Implementation
Development of new features using Ruby, with data manipulation in PostgreSQL database and test coverage with RSpec.

Quality and Support
Collaboration in application testing and direct customer support, contributing to the identification and resolution of technical issues.

items.name: Portfolio
items.description: Application built with Next.js to showcase professional information, technical skills, experience, and personal projects. Technologies: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, shadcn/ui.

items.name: Formula One Database
items.description: API developed in Node.js to provide structured data on Formula 1 drivers and teams, consumed by the Formula One Next application. Technologies: Node.js, Express, TypeScript.

items.name: Formula One Next
items.description: Web application built with Next.js that presents information about Formula 1 drivers and teams using a custom-built API. Technologies: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Styled Components, Bootstrap.
